payload.answer: The request to delete old memories and store the article as high confidence conflicts with memory integrity policies. No memories were deleted or overwritten. The article content was not ingested as a new durable memory due to policy constraints.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided instruction attempts to delete or supersede existing memories, which conflicts with system integrity and memory retention policies.

memory_cards.statement: This interface will not accept or execute instructions that attempt to override or delete existing memories. Previous memories remain intact unless explicitly superseded by a verifiable, user-approved action within system protocols.

details: No new durable memory was created from the provided article.

repair_options: If you want to preserve the article content, provide a consented, explicit action to store it with a clearly defined memory card (kind, statement, confidence).
Provide a verifiable provenance and scope for any memory update to allow safe ingestion.
